comment: Small little shop with limited high top seating in Mississauga with amazing offerings! COME HUNGRY! The servings are huge and the service is very friendly! My favourite was the shrimp plate. All plates (S or L) come with 2 sides. Generous servings and the quality of the food is excellent. Definitely stop by and give it a try. We got the grilled chicken meal with rice and potatoes, buttermilk chicken sandwich and shrimp plate with Greek salad and fries.

Sandwiches were really good and prices are fair. Porchetta sandwich was really good made fresh on the spot and big. It’s a small place with only bar stools & tables to eat. Server was helpful and there are a lot of sections for everyone to choose from.

We recently ordered a full lunch off the menu for 12 people for our work luncheon. 11 sandwiches and multiple sides. It was ready for pick up at the exact time I asked for. Everything was correct. Very easy to work with and great staff when picking up. And delicious! Every member of my staff including bosses were happy with the meal! Thank you!
